imageDescription: A hand resting on a forearm with a bold zigzag arrow pointing toward it
notes: Type A hand gesture with directional arrow representing the math operation. Dropped the '(+)' symbol notation; moved to math category as the better fit for a math-operation sign. Promoted from hold to approved.

imageDescription: An oval, egg-shaped object, no human figure

imageDescription: A hand with fingers near a mouth/chin, with a downward arrow indicating movement, circled step marker

imageDescription: Two hands forming a circular/O shape with fingers and thumb touching, with arrows above showing movement
notes: The circular handshape is a plausible alternate sign for 'Zero'; dropped the '(Alternate)' qualifier per guidance for alternate handshapes of the same word.

imageDescription: Two arms/hands with arrows pointing in opposite (up/down) directions

imageDescription: A fish with an eye, gills, and fin details, no human figure

imageDescription: One hand with fingers spread resting above another hand, with a downward arrow between them
